sn56.20:1.1: “Monks, these four things are real, not unreal, without alteration.
sn56.20:1.3: “‘This is stress,’ is real, not unreal, without alteration.
sn56.20:1.4: ‘This is the origination of stress,’ is real, not unreal, without alteration.
sn56.20:1.5: ‘This is the cessation of stress,’ is real, not unreal, without alteration.
sn56.20:1.6: ‘This is the path of practice leading to the cessation of stress,’ is real, not unreal, without alteration.
sn56.20:1.7: “These are the four things that are real, not unreal, without alteration.
sn56.20:2.1: “Therefore your duty is the contemplation, ‘This is stress … This is the origination of stress … This is the cessation of stress.’ Your duty is the contemplation, ‘This is the path of practice leading to the cessation of stress.’”
